name: Genenta Science S.p.A. American Depositary Shares
summary: Genenta Science S.p.A. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on developing cell and gene therapies for the treatment of cancer. The company's lead product candidate is Temferon, an autologous hematopoietic stem cell gene therapy for glioblastoma multiforme. Genenta Science S.p.A. is headquartered in Milan, Italy.
